allow: Bash(python -c "from gppu.gppu import PathBuilder; print\('base_path:', PathBuilder.base_path\(\)\); print\('data_path:', PathBuilder.data_path\(\)\); print\('app_path:', PathBuilder.app_path\(\)\); print\('os:', PathBuilder.os\); print\('user:', PathBuilder.user\)")
Bash(python -c "from gppu.gppu import PathBuilder; from pathlib import Path; print\(PathBuilder.app_path\(Path\('RAN/Win11'\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from gppu.gppu import Env; print\('base_path:', Env.base_path\(\)\); print\('data_path:', Env.data_path\(\)\); print\('os:', Env.os\); print\('user:', Env.user\)")
Bash(python -c "from gppu.gppu import Env; print\('home:', Env.home\); print\('user:', Env.user\); print\('os:', Env.os\)")
